headline.title: Microsoft, Google, Amazon say Anthropic Claude remains available to non-defense customers

tools.summary: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. As Anthropic’s
tools.content: The Pentagon has officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk after the two failed to agree on how much control the military should have over its AI models, including its use in autonomous weapons and mass domestic surveillance. As Anthropic’s $200 million contract fell apart, the DoD turned to OpenAI instead, which accepted and then watched ChatGPT uninstalls surge 295%. research.title: SkillNet: Create, Evaluate, and Connect AI Skills
research.summary:
arXiv:2603.04448v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Current AI agents can flexibly invoke tools and execute complex tasks, yet their long-term advancement is hindered by the lack of systematic accumulation and transfer of skills. Without a unified mecha
research.content:
arXiv:2603.04448v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Current AI agents can flexibly invoke tools and execute complex tasks, yet their long-term advancement is hindered by the lack of systematic accumulation and transfer of skills. Without a unified mechanism for skill consolidation, agents frequently ``reinvent the wheel'', rediscovering solutions in isolated contexts without leveraging prior strategies. To overcome this limitation, we introduce SkillNet, an open infrastructure designed to create, e

research.title: Capability Thresholds and Manufacturing Topology: How Embodied Intelligence Triggers Phase Transitions in Economic Geography
research.summary:
arXiv:2603.04457v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The fundamental topology of manufacturing has not undergone a paradigm-level transformation since Henry Ford's moving assembly line in 1913. Every major innovation of the past century, from the Toyota
research.content:
arXiv:2603.04457v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The fundamental topology of manufacturing has not undergone a paradigm-level transformation since Henry Ford's moving assembly line in 1913. Every major innovation of the past century, from the Toyota Production System to Industry 4.0, has optimized within the Fordist paradigm without altering its structural logic: centralized mega-factories, located near labor pools, producing at scale. We argue that embodied intelligence is poised to break this

research.title: Progressive Refinement Regulation for Accelerating Diffusion Language Model Decoding
research.summary:
arXiv:2603.04514v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Diffusion language models generate text through iterative denoising under a uniform refinement rule applied to all tokens. However, tokens stabilize at different rates in practice, leading to substanti
research.content:
arXiv:2603.04514v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Diffusion language models generate text through iterative denoising under a uniform refinement rule applied to all tokens. However, tokens stabilize at different rates in practice, leading to substantial redundant refinement and motivating refinement control over the denoising process. Existing approaches typically assess refinement necessity from instantaneous, step-level signals under a fixed decoding process. In contrast, whether a token has co

culture.title: The Guardian view on AI in war: the Iran conflict shows that the paradigm shift has already begun
culture.summary:
The intensified use of artificial intelligence, and rows over its control, demonstrate the need for democratic oversight and multilateral controls
“Never in the future will we move as slow as we are moving now,” the UN secretary-general, António Gute
culture.content:
The intensified use of artificial intelligence, and rows over its control, demonstrate the need for democratic oversight and multilateral controls
“Never in the future will we move as slow as we are moving now,” the UN secretary-general, António Guterres, warned this week, addressing the urgent need to shape the use of artificial intelligence. culture.title: AI agents pose untold risk to humanity. We must act to prevent that future | David Krueger
culture.summary:
The pieces are falling into place for autonomous artificial intelligence. We must stop unregulated development
Artificial intelligence is en route to artificial life. Exhibit A: “Moltbook”, an online platform designed for AI systems to communicate wi
culture.content:
The pieces are falling into place for autonomous artificial intelligence. We must stop unregulated development
Artificial intelligence is en route to artificial life. Exhibit A: “Moltbook”, an online platform designed for AI systems to communicate with one another, sans humans.

culture.title: North Korean agents using AI to trick western firms into hiring them, Microsoft says
culture.summary:
Firm says AI tools are masking identities of false applicants, who then funnel wages from remote IT jobs to North Korea
Fake IT workers deployed by North Korea are using AI technology, including voice-changing tools, to trick western companies into h
culture.content:
Firm says AI tools are masking identities of false applicants, who then funnel wages from remote IT jobs to North Korea
Fake IT workers deployed by North Korea are using AI technology, including voice-changing tools, to trick western companies into hiring them, Microsoft has said.

culture.title: Ben Affleck sells his AI postproduction startup to Netflix
culture.summary:
Announcing the InterPositive deal, the actor says he was moved from being scared of the technology to embracing it
Ben Affleck has sold his artificial intelligence company to Netflix in a surprise deal, saying he had been driven to embrace a technolo
culture.content:
Announcing the InterPositive deal, the actor says he was moved from being scared of the technology to embracing it
Ben Affleck has sold his artificial intelligence company to Netflix in a surprise deal, saying he had been driven to embrace a technology that had initially “really scared” him.
Netflix has acquired the postproduction startup InterPositive from the Oscar-winning actor, director, producer and screenwriter for an undisclosed sum.

culture.title: UK arts must not be sacrificed for speculative AI gains, peers say
culture.summary:
Ministers urged to abandon plans to let tech firms use work of novelists, artists and writers without permission
The UK’s creative industries must not be sacrificed in the pursuit of speculative gains in AI technology, a House of Lords committee has
culture.content:
Ministers urged to abandon plans to let tech firms use work of novelists, artists and writers without permission
The UK’s creative industries must not be sacrificed in the pursuit of speculative gains in AI technology, a House of Lords committee has warned, as the government prepares to reveal the economic cost of proposals to change copyright rules.
